description: Inject current workspace Taskferry context at session start

hooks.command:
if command -v taskferry >/dev/null 2>&1; then if context="$(taskferry context --directory "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" --format toon)"; then printf '%s
' "$context" | node -e 'const fs = require("node:fs"); const additionalContext = fs.readFileSync(0, "utf8"); process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ hookSpecificOutput: { hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext } }));'; else printf '%s
' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"taskferry context failed. Run taskferry doctor to diagnose."}}'; fi; else printf '%s
' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"taskferry is unavailable. Install taskferry and ensure it is on PATH, then restart Claude Code."}}'; fi
